text.title: Growth Community Building Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Is one platform locked in AND ≥5 planted conversations drafted?

branch.question: Is a named host committed to 3+ rituals/week for ≥8 weeks?

branch.conclusion: Launch: open seed invites (50 hand-picked); start rituals on week 1.
Skip launch; recruit a named host first — empty rituals kill faster than empty rooms.
Skip this methodology. Pick one platform + draft ≥5 conversation prompts before any invite.

text.example: platform=discord prompts=7 host=ruslan@faion.net rituals=daily-standup,weekly-office-hours,monthly-ama → launch with 50 seed invites per r2-pre-seed.
